# CloudPipelines
> 2026 Infrastructure & FinOps Audit platform helping mid-market firms reduce cloud waste.

## Pages
- [Home / Audit](https://cloudpipelines.com/): Lead capture and infrastructure audit.
- [Infrastructure Shootout](https://cloudpipelines.com/comparison.html): Compare Cloudways, Kinsta, DigitalOcean.
- [Success](https://cloudpipelines.com/success.html): Post-audit recommendation and CTA.
- [Cloudways Blueprint](https://cloudpipelines.com/cloudways/): Dedicated Cloudways landing page.

## Targeted Audience
CTOs, FinOps leads, and DevOps engineers looking to reduce annual cloud spend by up to 30%.
